examples: We went to a fancy restaurant for our anniversary.
That's a fancy car you've got there.
She was wearing a fancy dress to the party.
context: The restaurant was really fancy and looked like an art gallery. They did all of the grilling for us. And I ate so much mokar. It's my absolute favorite.

examples: I made a reservation for 7 pm.
You need a reservation at that restaurant.
context: So, I slept in on Saturday and had kind of a slow morning, which was really nice. They made a reservation for us to go on a yacht tour. So, that was our first outing of the day. I love being on the water, so I was super excited for this part of the trip. The boat was huge and they had all you can drink wine and beer plus some snacks. We did have two small cups of beer, but we didn't go too crazy. The weather was sunny and nice, but it was extremely windy, so there were huge waves and you had to be very careful walking on the boat. Also, my hair was blowing all over the place, so I looked a little bit crazy. We all cracked up at our photos because it looked like I had a mop on my head. My pants were blowing up like a parachute, too. I was just a hot mess. We rode past a bunch of cliffs and caves and I really felt the island vibe of Jedju there. We even got to go fishing at one point.

examples: This place has a great vibe.
I'm getting good vibes from this restaurant.
The vibe at the concert was electric.
